Column ii
r ii' 1r ii 1

bi₃-ti-iq-ti la₃ BAL RA x [...]

He should not cross over the water from a breached dam. ... [...]

r ii' 22

ina MU.SARe LU₂ la GU₃si x [...]  ; ik-kil-lu [...]

The man should not cry out in the garden. ... [...] lamentation [...]

ina u₂-šal-li ID₂ la₃ [...]
